scripts.check: npm run fmt:check && npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.bundle: npm run build && rm -rf ~/.claude/orch && mkdir -p ~/.claude/orch/js ~/.claude/orch/skills && cp dist/*.js ~/.claude/orch/js/ && cp -r skills/* ~/.claude/orch/skills/ && ln -s $(pwd)/node_modules ~/.claude/orch/js/node_modules && echo 'Bundled to ~/.claude/orch/'
